trustedSourceSummary: No official consumer documents were found in the last 60 days, so the latest available official sources from 2025-2026 were used. Organizations used: Altroconsumo. Altroconsumo’s 2025 guide highlights the two DOP varieties as the most authentic and quality options, providing clear criteria for choosing the right balsamic vinegar.
